MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JOEL ASSEKO, ALFREDO RITA, and, ALEX SHPAK Motion for Preliminary Approval of 1. The Terms and Conditions of the Settlement Agreement; 2. The Notice of Proposed Settlement of Class Action; 3. The Claim Form and Request for Exclusion Form; 4. The Setting of the Formal Fairness Hearing on the Settlement. Appearances: Christopher Robyn, Esq. of Heintz Robyn & Digesti, (800) 939-8533, appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; Martin Bern, Esq. of Munger Tolles & Orsen, (415) 512-4021, appearing for Defendant Guardsmark LLC. The tentative ruling is not being contested. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. The matter is continued to October 29, 2009 for hearing on Final Approval of Class Settlement. (List of dates re: the implementation schedule is attached as Exhibit A to the Proposed Order.) Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
